arts.ttl: Rangers in picture for attacker – Barcelona interest could make signing difficult for Philippe Clement’s side
arts.sum: Rangers have set their eyes on Relebohile Mofokeng, but Barcelona interest could make it challenging for Philippe Clement’s side to sign him. That’s according to South Africa’s Soccer Laduma, and they provide the latest on Rangers and Barcelona. Barcelona manager Hansi Flick holds hour-long discussion with players after poor form wipes out La Liga lead - Football España Barcelona manager Hansi Flick has confirmed that Dani Olmo is back in contention for a starting spot against RCD Mallorca, despite missing out against Las Palmas due to an injury concern.

arts.ttl: Why Atlético can beat Barcelona, Real Madrid to LaLiga title this season
arts.sum: With Barcelona and Real Madrid looking vulnerable this season, Atlético Madrid have the opportunity to contend for the title. Will they take it?

arts.ttl: Barcelona sends scouts to watch 20-year-old South Africa talent
arts.sum: Barcelona have made a point of expanding and focusing their scouting network across the African continent over the last couple of years, as evidenced by the arrivals of Ibrahim Diarra and David Oduro from Senegal and Ghana respectively. The latest talent to catch their eye is in South Africa. Orlando Pirates winger Relebohile Mofokeng is […] The post Barcelona sends scouts to watch 20-year-old South Africa talent appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Why are Barcelona and Real Madrid not playing in the second round of the 24/25 Copa del Rey?
arts.sum: Real Madrid and Barça are the league representatives as winners and runners-up from the 23-24 season with Athletic Club and Real Mallorca the Copa del Rey winners and beaten finalists last season. However, attentive Spanish football fans will notice that a handful of high profile teams are absent from the second round games with Real Madrid, FC Barcelona, Athletic Club and Real Mallorca all missing out from the opening stage and this round.

arts.ttl: Barcelona OUT of Williams race as Arsenal or Chelsea on RED ALERT
arts.sum: Barcelona are no longer in the market for Nico Williams, who is now angling for a Premier League move, according to a report. Barcelona OUT of Williams race as Arsenal or Chelsea on RED ALERT

arts.sum: Alexander Isak has become one of Eddie Howe’s most important players at Newcastle, but the Swede is set to be the subject of a bid from Barcelona.
